kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Wulfric goes with at least two of Blacksmith, Horseshoes, and Riverside.
Blacksmith goes with exactly two of Matilda, Anvil, Rope, Kingsford, and 2 coins.
The artisan who makes Candles' levy is lower than both the Mason and the artisan in Eastcheap.
The artisan with the Mallet's levy is between the artisan in Riverside and the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
If Wulfric does not go with Fletcher, then someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Cedric.
Horseshoes, Rope, and Kingsford go with Rowan, Blacksmith, and Fletcher, in some order.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Anvil; Rowan goes with Boots; Blacksmith goes with Riverside.
Matilda, Loom, Boots, and 3 coins belong to different artisans.
At most one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the River Ward.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Wade goes with at least two of Bass, Nightcrawler, and Pinehollow.
Bass goes with exactly two of Esther, Popper, Shrimp, Foxglen, and 12 lb.
The angler fishing with Dough's weight is lower than both the angler who landed the Pike and the angler at Birchpool.
The angler using the Swimbait's weight is between the angler at Pinehollow and the angler fishing with Nightcrawler.
If Wade does not go with Catfish, then someone in the Pike Family goes with Boone.
Nightcrawler, Shrimp, and Foxglen go with Mabel, Bass, and Catfish, in some order.
Exactly one of these is true: Boone goes with Popper; Mabel goes with Corn; Bass goes with Pinehollow.
Esther, Spoon, Corn, and 13 lb belong to different catches.
At most one member of the Sunfish Family is in the East Watershed.
